todo.title: Under development
todo.description: This feature is not yet available and is under development.

method_not_allowed.title: Method not available
method_not_allowed.description: Perhaps the developers made a mistake and it shouldn't be like this

unauthorized.title: Access is denied
unauthorized.description: To view the content you must log in

tag_not_found.title: Tag not found
tag_not_found.description: You may have thought that such a tag exists

user_not_found.title: User is not found
user_not_found.description: Try searching for other existing users

feed_not_found.title: Feeds not found
feed_not_found.description: Try looking for other existing feeds

user_suspended.title: User suspendet
user_suspended.description: I don’t know what this means, but he did something interesting

user_deleted.title: User deleted
user_deleted.description: And anyway, where is such confidence that he existed?

user_not_activated.title: User is not activated
user_not_activated.description: As soon as he confirms his email, he will appear here

entry_not_found.title: Record not found
entry_not_found.description: Most likely, she was never here.

entry_hidden.title: Post hidden
entry_hidden.description: Yes, and this happens in our abode of free speech.

bad_request.title: Bad request
bad_request.description: Most likely, you did something wrong and the server did not understand you

err_canceled.title: Request canceled
err_canceled.description: You most likely canceled the request

err_network.title: Connection error
err_network.description: Most likely, the server is unavailable or simply does not want to talk

network_error.title: Connection error
network_error.description: Most likely, the server is unavailable or simply does not want to talk

invalid_connection.title: Incorrect connection
invalid_connection.description: Most likely, the server is unavailable or simply does not want to talk

timeout_exceeded.title: The server did not respond for a very long time
timeout_exceeded.description: Most likely, the server is unavailable or simply does not want to talk

empty_bookmarks.title: No bookmarks
empty_bookmarks.description: To make them appear here you need to add them

empty_search.title: No results
empty_search.description: It might be worth clarifying your request.

empty_notifications.title: No notifications
empty_notifications.description: Most likely they will appear soon

empty_feeds.title: No feeds
empty_feeds.description: Maybe it’s worth looking for suitable ones and subscribing to them, what do you think?
